scripts.build: bun run build:admin && bun run build:server && bun run build:assets
scripts.build:assets: rm -rf dist/admin dist/migrations && mkdir -p dist/admin dist/migrations && cp -R admin/dist dist/admin/dist && cp migrations/*.sql dist/migrations/
scripts.build:server: tsup src/index.ts --format esm --platform node --target node20 --out-dir dist --clean
